title: Syktyvkar Airport
summary: Syktyvkar Airport (Komi: Сыктывкар Войтыркостса Аэропорт, (IATA: SCW, ICAO: UUYY)) is an airport in the Komi Republic, Russia located just within the city of Syktyvkar. It services medium-sized aircraft. The terminal is on the northwest side of the aerodrome with 10 large parking spaces and 9 small ones. The maintenance area is on the northeast side. The airport supports 24-hour operations.
text:
Syktyvkar Airport (Komi: Сыктывкар Войтыркостса Аэропорт, (IATA: SCW, ICAO: UUYY)) is an airport in the Komi Republic, Russia located just within the city of Syktyvkar. It services medium-sized aircraft. The terminal is on the northwest side of the aerodrome with 10 large parking spaces and 9 small ones. The maintenance area is on the northeast side. The airport supports 24-hour operations.
